title: Extended Diffusion Long Video Generation
interaction_flow: Caller → get_condition_latent(model, video_path, num_of_latent_condition, state_shape): reads initial condition latent
get_condition_latent → read_video_or_image_into_frames_BCTHW(path, H, W): returns input_frames BCTHW
get_condition_latent → compute_num_frames_condition(model, num_of_latent_condition): returns num_frames_condition int
get_condition_latent → create_condition_latent_from_input_frames(model, input_frames, num_frames_condition): returns (condition_latent BCTHW, encode_input_frames)
create_condition_latent_from_input_frames → VAE.encode(encode_input_frames): encodes pixel frames to latent BCTHW
Caller → switch_config_for_inference(model): context manager, sets condition_location='first_n', apply_corruption='noise_with_sigma_fixed'
Caller → generate_video_from_batch_with_loop(model, state_shape, data_batch, condition_latent, num_of_loops, num_of_latent_overlap_list, guidance, num_steps, seed, ...)
generate_video_from_batch_with_loop: pad condition_latent to state_shape if needed

generate_video_from_batch_with_loop → ExtendDiffusionModel.generate_samples_from_batch(data_batch, guidance, state_shape, num_steps, seed+i, condition_latent, num_condition_t=overlap_i, condition_video_augment_sigma_in_inference)
generate_samples_from_batch → self.get_x0_fn_from_batch_with_condition_latent(data_batch, guidance, condition_latent, num_condition_t, augment_sigma, seed)

get_x0_fn_from_batch_with_condition_latent → self.add_condition_video_indicator_and_video_input_mask(condition_latent, condition, num_condition_t): sets gt_latent, condition_video_indicator [B,1,T,1,1], condition_video_input_mask [B,1,T,H,W]
generate_samples_from_batch → misc.arch_invariant_rand(...) * sde.sigma_max: initialise x_sigma_max noise
generate_samples_from_batch → self.sampler(x0_fn, x_sigma_max, num_steps, sigma_max): runs diffusion sampling loop
x0_fn → self.denoise(noise_x, sigma, condition, augment_sigma, seed) → VideoDenoisePrediction.x0_pred_replaced
denoise → self.augment_conditional_latent_frames(condition, cfg, gt_latent, augment_sigma, sigma, seed)
augment_conditional_latent_frames: if sigma < augment_sigma → zero out condition_video_indicator (start joint denoising)
denoise: compose new_noise_xt = indicator * augment_latent + (1-indicator) * noise_x
denoise → super().denoise(new_noise_xt, sigma, condition): base model forward pass
denoise → returns VideoDenoisePrediction(x0, eps, logvar, net_in, net_x0_pred, xt, x0_pred_replaced)
generate_video_from_batch_with_loop → compute_num_frames_condition(model, overlap_i+1): num_cond_frames for next loop
generate_video_from_batch_with_loop → VAE.decode(sample): decode latent to pixel frames [B,3,T,H,W] in [0,1]
generate_video_from_batch_with_loop: slice/trim conditional frames from grid_np for output
generate_video_from_batch_with_loop → create_condition_latent_from_input_frames(model, condition_frame_input, num_cond_frames): re-encode last frames as new condition_latent
generate_video_from_batch_with_loop: video_THWC = np.concatenate(grid_list) or decode all latents together
generate_video_from_batch_with_loop → returns (video_THWC np.array THWC [0,255], condition_latent_list, sample_latent [, noise])
key_relationships: ExtendDiffusionModel.denoise composes augment_conditional_latent_frames + base model denoise
VAE (model.tokenizer / model.vae) used for encode and decode in create_condition_latent_from_input_frames and loop decode

data_objects.condition_latent: torch.Tensor BCTHW (bfloat16); latent encoding of condition (seed) frames
data_objects.condition_video_augment_sigma: float scalar; sigma fed to network for the corrupted condition region
data_objects.augment_latent: BCTHW; condition latent corrupted with fixed/sampled noise
data_objects.new_noise_xt: BCTHW; composed model input: augment_latent in cond region, noise_x in gen region
data_objects.VideoDenoisePrediction: dataclass {x0, eps, logvar, net_in, net_x0_pred, xt, x0_pred_replaced}
data_objects.x0_fn: closure(noise_x, sigma) → CFG-guided x0 prediction; passed to sampler
data_objects.video_THWC: np.array THWC uint8 [0,255]; final long video concatenated across loops

sliding_window_logic.num_of_latent_overlap_list: Per-loop count of latent frames to reuse as condition (sliding overlap)
sliding_window_logic.condition_propagation: After each loop, last num_cond_frames of decoded output are re-encoded (or last latent sliced if skip_reencode) to form the next condition_latent
sliding_window_logic.augment_sigma_schedule: augment_sigma_list[i] per loop; if current sigma < augment_sigma, condition_video_indicator zeroed so model jointly denoises all frames
sliding_window_logic.first_loop_special: First loop keeps all output frames; subsequent loops trim leading conditional (overlapped) frames before concatenation

config_flags.normalize_condition_latent: bool; normalize gt_latent to zero mean / unit variance before augment
config_flags.condition_on_augment_sigma: bool; feed augment_sigma as extra conditioning signal to network
config_flags.compute_loss_for_condition_region: bool; whether loss is also computed on condition frames
config_flags.add_pose_condition: bool; adds Plucker embedding camera pose to condition (camera-control variant)

important_notes: The core sliding-window loop lives in generate_video_from_batch_with_loop. It calls ExtendDiffusionModel.generate_samples_from_batch per window, which internally builds a CFG x0_fn via get_x0_fn_from_batch_with_condition_latent, and runs a standard diffusion sampler. The condition latent is propagated between windows either by re-encoding decoded pixel frames (default) or by directly reusing the tail of the latent (skip_reencode=True). The augment_conditional_latent_frames method is the key mechanism: it injects controlled noise into the condition frames so the model learns smooth continuation. switch_config_for_inference is a context-manager that patches model config for inference mode.
